source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
kun'-tri-man (sumphuletes): "Of the same tribe" (1Th 2:14); also in idiomatic rendering (genos) for those of one's own race or kin (2Co 11:26; Ga 1:14 the King James Version, "one's own nation"). Compare Mr 6:4; Ro 9:3; and see COUSIN; KINSMAN, etc.

�
